form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second last of 14 at Doncaster October 25 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 20 len behind Desperate Dan with 58.5kg at $17. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.0 len Pontefract July 8 over 1600m defeating Uppercase with 64.5kg at $3.80. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 16th of 22 at Doncaster on March 28 over 1600m, 21 len behind Mezcala with 60kg at $41. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 8th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on March 27 over 1600m, 6 len behind Saytarr with 58.5kg at $7.50. form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign ninth of 11 at Nottingham October 8 over 1700m, 16 len behind Ultrasoul carrying 60kg at $26. Previously first up; fourth of 8 at this track April 17 over 1600m, 2 len behind Overnight Oats with 55.5kg at $7.50. Certainly one to consider.
